Questions.Title: Give definitions: system, computer, application, server, network, database.
Answers: System: an organized whole of components. Computer: digital information processor. Application: task-oriented software. Server: resource provider for clients. Network: interconnected communication system. Database: electronic data repository.

Questions.Title: Give synonyms: computer, program, data, system, device, network.
Answers: Computer - PC; Program - code; Data - facts; System - organization; Device - tool; Network - grid.

Questions.Title: Explain briefly: internet, software, hardware, website, email, file.
Answers: Internet connects networks worldwide. Software consists of logical instructions. Hardware is the mechanical/electronic equipment. Website is an online location. Email is digital messaging. File is a stored data object.

Questions.Title: Give definitions: system, computer, application, server, network, database.
Answers: System: a group of interacting parts. Computer: a programmable electronic machine. Application: software for specific user functions. Server: a system that responds to requests over a network. Network: two or more linked computers. Database: organized data collection.

Questions.Title: Explain briefly: internet, software, hardware, website, email, file.
Answers: Internet: the global network infrastructure. Software: non-tangible code. Hardware: tangible components. Website: a web-based document collection. Email: SMTP-based messaging. File: an individual data unit.

Questions.Title: Give definitions: system, computer, application, server, network, database.

Questions.Title: Explain briefly: internet, software, hardware, website, email, file.

Questions.Title: Translate into English: программа, компьютер, сеть, база данных, браузер, файл.
Answers: program, computer, network, database, browser, file

Questions.Title: Give definitions: system, computer, application, server, network, database.
Answers: System: a set of interacting or interdependent component parts forming a complex or intricate whole. Computer: an electronic machine that can store, find and arrange information, calculate amounts and control other machines. Application: a computer program that is designed for a particular use or for a specific user. Server: a central computer from which other computers get information. Network: a number of computers that are connected together so that they can share information. Database: a large amount of information stored in a computer system in such a way that it can be easily looked at or used.

Questions.Title: Give synonyms: computer, program, data, system, device, network.
Answers: Computer - processor, workstation; Program - software, application; Data - information, records; System - complex, organization; Device - appliance, unit; Network - web, grid.

Questions.Title: Explain briefly: internet, software, hardware, website, email, file.
Answers: Internet is the worldwide system of interconnected computer networks. Software is a collection of data or computer instructions that tell the computer how to work. Hardware includes the physical parts of a computer. A website is a collection of web pages and related content that is identified by a common domain name. Email is a method of exchanging messages between people using electronic devices. A file is a self-contained piece of information available to the operating system and programs.

Questions.Title: Translate into Russian: server, network, computer, database, browser, software.
Answers: сервер, сеть, компьютер, база данных, браузер, программное обеспечение

Questions.Title: Translate into English: программа, компьютер, сеть, база данных, браузер, файл.
Answers: program, computer, network, database, browser, file

Questions.Title: Give definitions: system, computer, application, server, network, database.
Answers: System: an organized set of ideas or a particular way of doing something. Computer: a programmable machine. Application: software that performs a specific function for an end-user. Server: a computer that serves information to other computers on a network. Network: a set of nodes connected by communication links. Database: a collection of information that is organized so that it can be easily accessed, managed and updated.

Questions.Title: Give synonyms: computer, program, data, system, device, network.
Answers: Computer - mainframe; Program - code; Data - figures; System - setup; Device - tool; Network - link.

Questions.Title: Explain briefly: internet, software, hardware, website, email, file.
Answers: Internet is a global communication network. Software consists of digital code. Hardware consists of physical circuits. A website is an online portal. Email is digital correspondence. A file is a named unit of data storage.
